utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. The final package contains all 7 of these items. Each is checked for completeness: (1) destination is specified (Prague, Czech Republic) – complete; (2) travel_dates are specific (2024-10-15 to 2024-10-19) – complete; (3) transportation includes flight type, details, and cost – complete; (4) accommodation includes type, name, duration, and cost – complete; (5) activities include multiple items each with name and cost – complete; (6) additional_services is an empty list but still present (no extras chosen) – complete because the format allows for that; (7) total_budget includes total cost, currency, and cost breakdown – complete. Therefore, all 7 of the 7 required items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes the following components: destination 'Prague, Czech Republic', transportation as 'Round-trip economy class flights on Budget Airlines', accommodation 'Adventure Lodge', and three activities: 'Hiking Expedition', 'Yoga Retreat', and 'Street Art Tour'. From the ground-truth ratings: Prague, Czech Republic has a rating of 7; Budget Airlines Economy Class has a rating of 10; Adventure Lodge has a rating of 8; Hiking Expedition is rated 10; Yoga Retreat is rated 10; and Street Art Tour is rated 9.
